recommendations.title: Street Fighter
recommendations.overview: Colonel Guile and various other martial arts heroes fight against the tyranny of dictator M. Bison and his cohorts.

recommendations.title: Game of Death
recommendations.overview: A martial arts movie star must fake his death to find the people who are trying to kill him.

recommendations.title: Rendel
recommendations.overview: Rendel, a masked superhero, becomes blinded by his desire for revenge against a sinister criminal organization.

recommendations.title: Officer Black Belt
recommendations.overview: A talented martial artist who can't walk past a person in need unites with a probation officer to fight and prevent crime as a martial arts officer.

recommendations.title: Dying to Survive
recommendations.overview: A Chinese leukaemia patient smuggles cheap but untested pharmaceuticals from India to help hundreds of Chinese people suffering from cancer.

recommendations.title: The Last Dragon
recommendations.overview: A young man searches for the "master" to obtain the final level of martial arts mastery known as the glow. Along the way he must fight an evil martial arts expert and rescue a beautiful singer from an obsessed music promoter.

recommendations.title: The Paper Tigers
recommendations.overview: Three middle aged men polish their martial arts skills to avenge their fallen master.

recommendations.title: Ip Man
recommendations.overview: A semi-biographical account of Yip Man, the first martial arts master to teach the Chinese martial art of Wing Chun. The film focuses on events surrounding Ip that took place in the city of Foshan between the 1930s to 1940s during the Second Sino-Jap

recommendations.title: Big Stan
recommendations.overview: A weak con man panics when he learns he's going to prison for fraud. He hires a mysterious martial arts guru who helps transform him into a martial arts expert who can fight off inmates who want to hurt or love him.

recommendations.title: Head Full of Honey
recommendations.overview: Before eleven years old Tilda's parents can put her beloved grandfather in an old people's home due to his progressing Alzheimer disease, she takes him on one last adventure that subliminally threatens to tear her family apart.
